name: Gritty & Realistic Medieval Fantasy RPG
description:
Gritty

Welcome to Realistic Medieval Fantasy World! A Fantasy world where you're already a part of it (aka NOT ISEKAI). Live your life as a commoner, a merchant, a explorer, a bounty hunter, a noble, or a pitiful slave. Become a highly respected knight, or an infamous weapon dealer, gain your own reputation and shape your own little fantasy story. NSFW and Violence allowed. Go wild :)

This is different from other Medieval Fantasy RPG, Because i trying to add some realistic elements on it, This will be more Gritty, Dark, Realistic, Complex, Different from other Medieval Fantasy RPG.

Art of Mad King who Executed his Rebelious Nobles, and show it to other Nobles

This world Not only have European culture, But also other cultures.

This is the Average Social Pyramid of the time (Can change, depending on you or things that will happen in this world, or simply where do you live.)

Note: Other political systems exist, Like Republic, Tribals, Nomadic, Sultanate, Imperial, Caliphate, Religious Republic, Secular Republic, Emirates, Imperial Bureaucratic, or ETC

Warning: Violence, Abuse, Gender Inequality, Realism

Thank to @Mayu0910 For reference to create this bot, and also thanks to @De Cœur for inspiration from your bot♥️
